misc: Loves basketball even more than Marcus, making some fans wonder if he's a real golfer
biography: Pasi, representing Vuosaari Golf Helsinki, is known throughout the Hector Trophée circuit by his distinctive moniker, "Susi-Pasi." This epithet, meaning "Wolf-Pasi," hints at a competitive nature that has both mystified and impressed observers during his tenure at this unique pair competition.

Across four previous appearances in the Hector Trophée, Pasi has demonstrated his capability to ascend to the pinnacle of the team format. He has been a pivotal member of a duo that successfully lifted the coveted Hector Trophée, a testament to his strategic play and clutch performance. While his individual pursuit of the Victor Trophy continues, his proven ability to contribute decisively to team success is a hallmark of his game.

His dedication to golf is occasionally juxtaposed with an even deeper affection for basketball, a passion so profound that it is rumored to surpass even that of fellow competitor Marcus. This spirited interest outside the golfing realm has sometimes led to lighthearted conjecture among fans about the depth of his commitment to the fairways. Although Pasi maintains an active status within the Hector events, he will not be among the field for the Hector Trophée 2026, leaving anticipation for his return in future editions.
